title: About
subTitle: About Lemonaide DMS
intro: Lemonaide DMS (Dealer Management System) is an admin portal for car dealerships, helping you manage inventory, leads, deals, and customers in one unified platform.
featureInventory: Inventory — Manage vehicle listings, status (draft, available, reserved, sold), photos and details.
featureLeads: Leads — Capture and track leads from multiple sources, update status (new, contacted, test drive, negotiation, closed, lost).
featureDeals: Deal / Pipeline — Track deals by stage: lead → test drive → negotiation → loan processing → won/lost.
featureCustomers: Customers — Store customer info, deal history and interactions.
techDesc: Modern web application with an intuitive interface and centralized, synced data management.
contactDesc: For product and deployment details, visit lemonaide.co.th or contact the Lemonaide team.
